Networking with Docker: Don't settle defaults.
That Docker humor you, onto true purpose this blog post: Networking with Docker!
Docker world, networking extremely important.
It's primary containers communicate with other isolated processes without writing disk without direct access binary.
Most networking configurations run-time options that either controlled Docker Docker Compose.
Docker types networks: single-host multi-host.
this topic, will focus single-host virtual networks multi-host container networking pertains more software like Kubernetes Docker Swarm.
Generally, each container loopback interface, private interface container, virtual interface host, address.
Each virtual interface host communicates with Docker bridge interface that acts router containers.
There four different types network configurations containers.
Listed from most secure/restrictive most open/unrestrictive.
Closed containers completely offline, providing only loopback interface.
While seem useful surface, closed containers actually have their place.
example, Netbeez sidecar logging pattern.
These sidecar containers great candidates with closed networking.
They require network access, only mounting volumes running tail.
Another container that runs closed network uses dmidecode, which needs access low-level system information.
consider this container security risk because requires sysrawio Linux capability access /dev/mem function properly.
removing network access (among other options harden container), limit risk this process poses system.
Bridged containers most popular networking type well Docker default.
They great balance between closed networks (which clearly restrictive most cases) joined networks.
default, bridged containers same network bridge.
containers each other have outbound access.
User-defined bridges isolate bridged containers from each other.
From organizational standpoint, both these networks separated mid-network.
only does this improve security, it's also somewhat self-documenting.
From high-level, easily which containers talk each other within docker-compose.yml.
Using internal network option allows container communicate with other containers.
outbound access allowed.
example, able ping Ruby Rails container google.com.
Specifying internal user-defined bridge network close container being closed container, without being closed container.
allows outbound access allows inter-container communication containers same network bridge.
Joined containers have network stack common.
It's similar running multiple services host from networking standpoint, except there still host isolation.
These types containers used Netbeez.
Joined containers still have their cases though.
example, desirable monitor internal network traffic container from another.
Open containers recommended.
This type container runs host's network stack.
open container that binds port binds host's port
Considering that containers root default (which should always changed anyway), this extremely dangerous.
This removes forms network isolation.
There many cases which open container would required.
have these containers with randomly assigned addresses, need containers find each other.
Containers could assigned static addresses, that's work messy solution.
Thankfully, Docker provides link aliases.
Link aliases allow containers with dependencies each other (for example, Rails depend MySQL) access each other link name.
Really, it's efficient assign hostnames containers easy access.
Closed containers cannot receive inbound requests open containers risk inbound access default.
Bridged joined containers cannot reached inbound from world default.
allow inbound access, container port must mapped host port runtime.
This either done one-off Docker written docker-compose configuration.
example, web-server could listen 9586 private interface.
Then Docker Compose remap that host.
Linux capabilities, large topic outside scope this post, deny allow certain privileges/actions, even affecting root user.
These privileges individual containers.
most cases, Linux capabilities removed from container with some reorganization effort.
This RedHat article good primer Docker Linux capabilities.
This capability allows binding privileged ports.
Dropping this capability from container prevents from binding ports lower than 1024 container network interface.
container that binds privileged this capability dropped, container will crash.
Therefore, internal container process needs reconfigured listen non-privileged port.
Then this non-privileged port container remapped privileged port host with docker-compose configuration change.
With five minutes work, eliminated unnecessary capabilities.
There many other Linux capabilities.
Some pertain networking, most don't.
net_bind_service probably capability most relevant networking, it's very easy drop fix.
Don't just accept defaults.

REYKJAVIK, Iceland, Jan. scientific paper published today team scientists from deCODE genetics colleagues report discovery variant gene chromosome that represents most significant genetic risk factor type diabetes (T2D) found date.
More than third individuals populations studied carry copy at-risk variant approximately increased risk disease compared controls; carry copies 141% greater risk.
original finding made Iceland subsequently confirmed studies Denmark United States.
paper published today online edition Nature Genetics will appear journal's February print edition.
"This milestone human genetics.
common gene variant conferring elevated risk been earnestly sought genetics community many years.
have found such variant, which estimate accounts about cases.
This discovery sheds light biological causes disease.
Importantly, virtually this risk captured looking single-letter change ideal development genetic test assessing individual risk developing more personalized effective prevention strategies.
This also exciting starting point discovery drugs, actively pursuing development both diagnostic therapeutic products better prevent treat T2D," said Kari Stefansson, deCODE senior author study.
variant located gene encoding protein called transcription factor 7-like (TCF7L2).
deCODE isolated gene following results population-based, genome-wide linkage scan Iceland that identified promising region chromosome
deCODE team genotyped microsatellite markers polymorphic signposts along genome this region total more than 2000 patients controls.
Analysis frequency different alleles, versions, these markers pinpointed version marker within gene encoding TCF7L2 that approximately times more common patients than controls.
This corresponds increase risk copy carried (there copies each chromosome every cell).
This finding replicated Danish U.S. cohorts, where at-risk version marker found confer increased risk 85%, respectively, copy carried.
cohorts combined, at-risk allele confers increase risk approximately those carrying copy, 141% increase risk individuals carrying copies.
Utilizing data from HapMap project, found that correlates nearly perfectly with at-risk microsatellite.
Diabetes affects nearly million people worldwide estimated million United States population.
vast majority diabetes patients have type diabetes, condition where body does produce enough insulin and/or cells body properly insulin.
United States, direct medical cost associated with diabetes nearly $100 billion year.
incidence type diabetes increasing rapidly industrialized world, part increase obesity, major risk factors developing disease.
deCODE genetics biopharmaceutical company applying discoveries human genetics development drugs common diseases.
deCODE global leader gene discovery population approach resources have enabled isolate genes contributing major public health challenges from cardiovascular disease cancer, genes that providing with drug targets rooted basic biology disease.
deCODE also leveraging expertise human genetics integrated drug discovery development capabilities offer innovative products services DNA-based diagnostics, bioinformatics, genotyping, structural biology, drug discovery clinical development.
deCODE delivering promise genetics.
